completed_tasks.name: Build 3-option spike (Kanban, Grouped List, Card Grid)
Identify stage-aware finance gap (no contract for early stages)
Rebuild spike with stage-aware finance, no table-only constraint
Extend to 5 options (add Attention Feed + Swimlane)
Make recommendation: D primary + B browse-all toggle

remaining_tasks.name: User decision on which option to build

blockers.description: Option E (Swimlane) requires stage transition timestamps not currently stored
blockers.workaround: Use updated_at as rough proxy, or defer E until data model supports stage history

human_actions_pending.action: Decide which option (D recommended, or hybrid) to implement

decisions.decision: Stage-aware finance: 3 display states (pre-contract, contracted-no-billing, active-billing)
decisions.rationale: Early-stage projects have no contract_cost — showing an empty billing bar is misleading

decisions.decision: Recommend Option D (Attention Feed) + B (Grouped List) as browse-all toggle
decisions.rationale: D answers 'what needs my eyes' rather than requiring management to scan neutrally; B preserved for team use
Requires stage transition timestamp history not currently in data model

next_action: Ask user which option to build, then /gsd:plan-phase for projects/services view redesign
context_notes: Pure design spike — no app code changed. Core insight: current table gives management no urgency signal. Option D surfaces computed signals (stale proposals, quiet on-going projects) so management reads top-to-bottom and acts.
